title: <div>  •  Serves as a subtle commentary on “quick fixes” vs. real learning.</div
content:
• Serves as a subtle commentary on “quick fixes” vs. real learning.
• Encourages participation in a harmless, funny way.

📜 2. Every Title Now Has Three Layers

📜 Titles will now reflect:
✔ A Meta-Level (course-wide thematic connection).
✔ A Week-Specific Level (literary movement, text, or major theme).
✔ A Literary Technique or Structural Layer (how the week fits into the greater narrative framework).

Example: Week 6 – Modernism & the Fragmentation of Narrative

📜 Title: “The Shattered Mirror: Modernism, Self-Perception, & the Fractured Mind”
✔ Meta-Level: “The Shattered Mirror” (how narratives no longer reflect reality clearly).
✔ Week-Specific: Modernist literature’s shift toward interiority & subjectivity.
✔ Structural Layer: This week represents the “Ordeal” phase in the Hero’s Journey (self-reckoning before transformation).

✅ Why This Works:
• Ensures that every title communicates multiple layers of meaning.
• Allows students to see how literature mirrors itself across different frameworks.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 113 (chunk 113/555)
